name: BEN_BILL_ENRT_RSLT_
description: This table is used to store the enrollment details for bill

columns.Name: BILL_ENRT_RSLT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BENEFIT_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to ben_benefit_relations_f.

columns.Name: ORGNL_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds original enrollment result ID.

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID

columns.Comments: This column holds Original Enrollment Date.

columns.Comments: This column holds Enrollment Coverage Thru date.

columns.Name: ELECTION_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds Elections made date.

columns.Name: BNFT_AMT
columns.Comments: This column holds coverage amount.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID

columns.Name: BILL_START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds bill start date.

columns.Name: BILL_END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column holds bill end date.

columns.Name: PRORATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column holds prorate type. Daily/Rule

columns.Name: PRORATE_PERCENT
columns.Comments: This column holds prorate percent.

columns.Name: PRORATE_DAYS
columns.Comments: This column holds prorate days.

columns.Name: STOP_BILL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Hold Bill Flag. Y or N.Default value N.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
